pipeline_1.calibration: isotonic fit on 2024 OOF, applied forward

pipeline_2.name: multibagger_pipeline_post_45a09dd_bugfix

constitution_caveats: Per CONSTITUTION.md §1.1: corporate-action calibrator bias is unresolved (entry 2026-05-04 in calibration_corrections.jsonl). Absolute scores carry unknown upward bias. Treat as STRONG RELATIVE RANKINGS.
Per CONSTITUTION.md §1.4: 80%-confidence bar at 100% threshold was empirically empty in 2025 OOS. Top-3 names are model's high-confidence picks, not validated 80% prospective claims.
Per CONSTITUTION.md §1.5: -30% drawdown floor binds. Tier-1+2 capped at 10.5% basket exposure.
Independence assumption in basket P(>=1 2x) is overstated; real basket-of-3 P(>=1 doubles in 180d) ~ 60-75% after correlation correction.
MTARTECH/KOVAI/NOVARTIND are momentum-loaded (RSI > 75, 20d returns > +40%). Persistence-of-trend may reverse.
Day-over-day stability vs 2026-05-04 commit 4b092e1: top-5 of pipeline 1 IDENTICAL (100% match) — signal is stable.
Infinite hypothesis loop: 9 cycles since 2026-05-04 launch, all DROP_AB_FAIL. No new data source has lifted prospective probability. Existing BASE_FEATS hold the alpha.
